title: Advancing Communication Between Different Groups with AI
short_title: Advancing Communication Between Different Groups with AI
author: __<u>Peinuan Qin</u>__, Prof. Naomi Yamashita
abstract: Our projects aim to address communication barriers between diverse groups, such as those that exist between native and non-native speakers. We use advanced AI and natural language processing technology to facilitate smoother interactions. Our work explores various roles that AI can play in this process, such as building intelligent agents or developing effective tools. The goal is to enhance team communication and collective intelligence, ultimately leading to improved collaboration in the global competitive landscape.
